name: Unichem Laboratories Limited
summary: Unichem Laboratories Limited, a pharmaceutical company, manufactures and sells pharmaceutical products in India, the United States, and internationally. It offers pharma products that address various therapeutic areas, such as gastroenterology, cardiology, diabetology, psychiatry, neurology, anti-bacterial, anti-infective, and pain management; and active pharmaceutical ingredients. The company was founded in 1944 and is based in Mumbai, India.
